name: TC-TXN-001 — Summary: Default period (week)
description:
Verifies the GET /summary?period=week endpoint.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/summary
**Param:** period=week
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with total_volume, success_rate, total_refunds fields.

This validates the default weekly aggregation used on the RMS dashboard.

This validates the default weekly aggregation used on the RMS dashboard.
